concerns.text: FR-001 mandates downloading BFI-2 from OpenML and Last.fm archive. The plan (research.md) explicitly states 'NO verified source found' for both and defaults to synthetic data. The plan lacks a task to implement the 'graceful fallback' mechanism required to satisfy FR-001's download attempt before falling back, risking silent failure of the requirement.

SC-001 requires comparing correlation coefficient r to 0.3. The plan (research.md) mentions calculating effect sizes but does not explicitly define a task or output field to record the boolean flag (True if r > 0.3) as mandated by the success criterion.

SC-003 requires measuring the validity of demographic controls by comparing regression coefficients with vs. without covariates. The plan describes running the regression with covariates but does not include a task to run a baseline model (without covariates) or a specific output to record the delta/change in coefficients.

The spec includes an assumption about performing a sensitivity analysis by sweeping alpha levels. The plan (research.md) does not mention this sensitivity analysis, nor does it define a task to sweep alpha levels or report stability results, leaving this spec element unbacked.
